<features>
- observable feature: animal is a horse
- observable feature: horse has white coat
- observable feature: horse is standing in grassy area
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal is a horse AND horse has white coat AND horse is standing in grassy area] THEN [7]
- IF [object has sail and is on water] THEN [8]
- IF [object is an airplane on ground] THEN [0]
- IF [animal is a deer in grassy area] THEN [4]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image shows a white horse standing in a grassy area, matching the condition for class 7.
</rule_check>
<response>7</response>
